title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TCI Express

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TCI Express
jsonLd.description:
Join the TCI Express family as a Fleet Manager in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TCI Express:
TCI Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TCI Express!
